response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in software craftsmanship, but lacks explicit experience in IT architecture design, UML, and client-facing consulting — critical for this role — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with multiple active, impactful projects
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks and environments
Demonstrated mentoring and workshop experience in testing and development practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or client advisory experience
Lacks documented experience in technical project management or IT consulting
